summary: Professional deep analysis of the FAA UAS Sighting Report dataset used in AeroGuardian. Examines all 31 confirmed failure records and 8,000 high-risk sightings. Includes: dataset provenance, column schema, fault-type distribution, hazard-category breakdown, UAV model identification, altitude analysis, PX4 Gazebo simulatability assessment, temporal distribution, comparison with Watters (2023) AIAA methodology, data quality issues found, and recommendations for DASC 2026 paper.
